prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data, specific financial news, or the ability to perform real-time financial analysis. Stock price predictions are inherently speculative and subject to numerous unpredictable factors. The point estimate assumes a very minor positive drift over seven days, consistent with a generally stable large-cap stock. The confidence intervals are illustrative, calculated using a hypothetical weekly volatility (standard deviation) of approximately 4.5% of the current price, applied to standard normal distribution multipliers. These figures should not be considered financial advice. Actual prices may vary significantly.
